queries.question: Tell me about educational jobs common to all schools.
queries.sql: SELECT Educational_Jobs.description  from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id   GROUP BY Jobs_at_School.job_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Jobs_at_School.school_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Schools)

queries.question: Tell me about educational jobs that each school offers.
queries.sql: select schools.name , educational_jobs.description from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?jobs_at_school a :Jobs_at_School .
  ?educational_jobs a :Educational_Jobs .
  ?jobs_at_school p:hasEducational_Jobs ?educational_jobs .
  ?schools a :Schools .
  ?jobs_at_school p:hasSchools ?schools .
  ?schools p:name ?name .
  ?educational_jobs p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What educational job is associated with each school?
queries.sql: SELECT Educational_Jobs.title  from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id   GROUP BY Jobs_at_School.job_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Jobs_at_School.school_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Schools)

queries.question: What educational job is associated with each school?
queries.sql: select schools.name , educational_jobs.title from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id

queries.question: For each school, list information about jobs they have (their titles and descriptions).
queries.sql: select schools.name , educational_jobs.title , educational_jobs.description from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title ?description WHERE {
  ?jobs_at_school a :Jobs_at_School .
  ?educational_jobs a :Educational_Jobs .
  ?jobs_at_school p:hasEducational_Jobs ?educational_jobs .
  ?schools a :Schools .
  ?jobs_at_school p:hasSchools ?schools .
  ?schools p:name ?name .
  ?educational_jobs p:title ?title .
  ?educational_jobs p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What information is there about jobs all schools have in common (their titles and descriptions)?
queries.sql: SELECT Educational_Jobs.title, Educational_Jobs.description  from Jobs_at_School join Educational_Jobs on Jobs_at_School.job_id = Educational_Jobs.job_id join Schools on Jobs_at_School.school_id = Schools.id   GROUP BY Jobs_at_School.job_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Jobs_at_School.school_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Schools)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me about educational jobs that each school offers.
What educational job is associated with each school?
Give me information about jobs every school has (their titles and descriptions).
